description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ubuntu:18.04 Docker image and set the variable GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY to recursive. Define a global before_script that runs apt-get update && apt-get -y install git cmake build-essential for all jobs. Add a job named current_version in the default test stage that executes the script commands: mkdir build, cd build, cmake .., and make. No caches, artifacts, services, or special rules are required.
